text.title: vision-document-extraction Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vision-document-extraction as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Validating extracted numerical data (totals, invoice amounts) from a single VLM pass without a verification step.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Claude 4 and GPT-4o hallucinate specific numbers in charts and financial tables — always validate extracted numerical data against a second pass or a deterministic chart parser before writing to ERP or accounting systems.

failure-mode.description: Using a single extraction prompt for all document types without schema specialisation.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Generic prompts produce inconsistent field names and miss document-type-specific fields (e.g., PO number on invoices, card_last_four on receipts). Schema-per-type prompts yield 30-50% higher field accuracy on benchmarks.
